ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cpi_values" (
  "cpi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CPI value */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province or territory */,
  "year_quarter" TEXT /* Year and quarter in the format YYYYQX */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of CPI value (baseline or alternative) */,
  "cpi_value" REAL /* The CPI value for the specified year, quarter, and type */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the CPI value */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the CPI value */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the CPI value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CPI value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CPI value was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the CPI value is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cpi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpi_values_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpi_values_value_type FOREIGN KEY ("value_type") REFERENCES cpi_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province or territory */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Full name of the province or territory */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the province or territory */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the province or territory */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the province or territory */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the province or territory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the province record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the province record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cpi_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CPI type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the CPI type (baseline or alternative) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the CPI type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CPI type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CPI type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "cpi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CPI value being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the CPI value */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the CPI value was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cpi_id FOREIGN KEY ("cpi_id") REFERENCES cpi_values ("cpi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
